summary: W879 routes W735 direct-localization boundary data through W735/W716 boundary source-pi-zero WPP limit stability and selected-row WPP-op colimit stability. It converts those concrete route inputs into W877 limit and colimit stability fields, then exposes finite-shape transfer, accepted stable boundary, bounded-derived, and ready stable-certificate outputs. This lowers the immediate direct-localization boundary frontier to three input families, but does not construct a nullary original four-task positive witness.
obligations_discharged: W877 WalkingParallelPair limit stability is now derived from W735/W716 boundary source-pi-zero data.
W877 WalkingParallelPair colimit stability is now derived from selected-W461 plus row-aware WPP-op provider data.

W735 closed-map and closed-embedding branch records can now enter the W877 direct-localization boundary without caller-supplied opaque WPP stability fields or W878's four direct-right-LCA/left-Snake route inputs.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: Separate opaque WalkingParallelPair limit-stability field for the direct-localization boundary.
Separate opaque WalkingParallelPair colimit-stability field for the direct-localization boundary.
Concrete WPP limit right open-map pure LCA route input for this boundary path.
Concrete WPP limit right-surjectivity pure LCA route input for this boundary path.
Concrete WPP-op left closed-embedding route input for this boundary path.
Concrete WPP-op AddCommGrp SnakeInput cokernel-row route input for this boundary path.
Closed quotient-cover and Epi boundary fields as separate WPP limit inputs for this boundary path.
W778/W792 closed-range comparison, exact-closure, target-homology-zero, and endpoint-topology fields for this direct-localization boundary path.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
OriginalFourTaskProductData still requires caller-supplied bounded-derived stable data, W852 route data, or W961 closed-embedding closedness field data; no nullary product witness exists.

The W879 bridge still consumes caller-supplied W735 branch data, selected-W461 provider data, and row-aware closed-map or closed-embedding provider data; it does not construct those values from nothing.
A concrete nullary W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch record is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WppOpSelectedW461ProviderW781 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WppOpClosedMapRowsProviderW781 or WppOpClosedEmbeddingRowsProviderW781 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
remaining_work: Construct concrete nullary W735 branch data or a stronger route that eliminates that branch input.
Construct concrete nullary selected-W461 and row-aware WPP-op provider data, or replace them with a stronger nullary colimit-stability theorem.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source-triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
